subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! His honour Haji Aqa Muhammad hath arisen with the utmost strength to support and assist you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی جناب حاجی آقا محمد بنهایت قوت بر نصرت و معاونت شما قیام نموده
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @exhortations and counsels, @chastisement and requital
